question: Which text is displayed on the screen to identify the speaker's name? A. Fashion Stylist B. Orene Kearn C. eHow D. style

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman with shoulder-length blonde hair wearing a dark green top and layered necklace stands center frame speaking to the camera. To her left, a dark grey sleeveless dress hangs on a hanger against the wall while beige curtains hang on a black rod in the background. A white and green eHow logo is visible in the bottom left corner along with text identifying her as a fashion stylist.

Describe the visual sequence of events from the start of the video through the presenter's introduction.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a green 3D text logo reading 'eHov' appears; at 2s, the word 'style' is revealed via a page-peel effect; at 4s, a woman in a green top stands beside a hanging grey dress; at 8s, text identifying 'Orene Kearn Fashion Stylist' displays on screen.
